results.why: rule 3 — a greeting must never touch the browser
rule 19 — naming a site in passing is conversation, not a request
rule 20 — feelings first, no fixes, no browser
rule 4 — nothing to do on the page, so it belongs in their own browser
the duplicate-tab bug — once it is open, the goal is finished
rule 4 — playing needs a page she can act on, so open_for_user is wrong
rule 0 — the information is already fetched, so answer instead of refetching
rule 6 — titles and urls must never be handed over as the answer
acts on the current snapshot rather than guessing an id
rule 1 — when the element is not in the snapshot, scroll or read instead of guessing
a file in their Kairos folder is read, not searched for on the web
once the file is in history, answer from it rather than reading it again
